finding: THE POINT: the shell AppLayout does NOT own the platform-variant leaves â€” `LeftSidebar`+`SidebarToggleButton` are injected props (AppLayoutProps). ziee's app-side AppLayout.tsx imports them via `@/` and passes them in, so `localOverridePlugin` swaps them to `.desktop` AT ZIEE'S INJECTION SITE (mechanism untouched). PROVEN on Linux: `resolveOverridePath` resolves both specifiers to `.desktop.tsx`, and an xvfb `vite build` of desktop/ui bundles `desktop-mac-glass-sidebar`+`data-sidebar-mask`+`Open sidebar`+`size-7 min-w-7` (desktop-variant-unique) while EXCLUDING `aria-expanded:bg-transparent`/`z-[35]`/`h-[40px]` (web-toggle-unique). Desktop variant is NOT silently replaced by the web one.

SettingsPage desktop override preserved by NOT moving SettingsPage. SettingsLayout (app-side, untouched) imports `@/modules/settings/SettingsPage`; `resolveOverridePath` confirms that specifier still â†’ `SettingsPage.desktop.tsx` on desktop. xvfb bundle: `Settings sections` (desktop-unique aria-label) present (1), `Settings navigation`+all web settings testids absent (0). The whole-file single-admin desktop SettingsPage still wins.

`Stores.AppLayout` â†’ typed `AppLayoutSeam` cast returns the SAME live proxy (Stores object identity unchanged), so `const {isSidebarCollapsed,nativeScroll}=appLayout` stays a reactive subscribe, `appLayout.$.sidebarWidth` stays the snapshot, and every `appLayout.setX(...)` action call is byte-identical to `Stores.AppLayout.setX(...)`. Mirrors the proven DivScrollY seam. All drag/collapse/touch/Sheet/viewport logic copied verbatim.

Slot item ifaces + the `Slots` augmentation moved; `PermissionExpr` now from `@ziee/framework/permissions` (same structural type the app already re-exports via core/permissions). App-side types.ts re-exports the 4 item types from appLayoutSlots AND side-effect-imports it, pulling the augmentation into the app graph â€” so `import '@/modules/layouts/app-layout/types'` (server-update appBanners), chat/types.ts `SidebarWidgetItem`, and LeftSidebar's item imports all resolve unchanged. ui tsc=0, desktop tsc=0.

Hook split preserves subscribe semantics: shell's `useWindowMinSize` (react-use `useWindowSize` + hysteresis ref) and `useElementMinSize` (ResizeObserver + setState) are store-free and moved verbatim. The store-coupled `useMainContentMinSize` stays app-side reading `useAppLayoutStore.getState()`/`.subscribe(...)` directly, composing shell's exported `calculateMinSize`/`applyHysteresis` â€” identical subscription behavior.

Permission-gating semantics on slot items UNCHANGED. The optional `permission?: PermissionExpr` field on SidebarNavItem/ToolItem/WidgetItem is carried verbatim; the shell AppLayout renders slot entries but does NOT evaluate permissions (per convention the slot renderers / LeftSidebar self-gate via evaluatePermission against the /auth/me-sourced permissions). No slot value is trusted from the wire. The appBanners slot render (`slots.get('appBanners')` sort+LazyComponentRenderer) is byte-identical, so the admin-only update banner keeps its contributor-gated visibility.

Every dest exists + resolves: shell exports AppLayout/AppLayoutProps, the 4 Sidebar*Item types, SettingsPageContainer, and the min-size helper set. shell tsc=0 resolves every symbol; ui tsc=0 + desktop tsc=0 resolve every shim. No moved implementation survives app-side as a divergent duplicate â€” AppLayout.tsx is a thin injection wrapper, useWindowMinSize/types/SettingsPageContainer are re-export shims (+ the one app-only useMainContentMinSize that never moved).

desktop/ui `xvfb-run npx vite build` = RC 0 through the new shell AppLayout. tsc gates: @ziee/shell=0, src-app/ui=0, src-app/desktop/ui=0. The desktop bundle contains the shell AppLayout chrome (app-sidebar, data-sidebar-resize-handle, all 7 slot names) proving the generic structure is what mounts on desktop.

Web renders identically: gallery runtime-health (--report-only, 200 surface/state cells Ă—2 themes, settings-scoped) reported 0 gating HIGH findings â€” no NEW HIGH vs baseline on the app-layout/settings surfaces (every surface mounts inside the moved AppLayout). Generated RUNTIME_FINDINGS.md reverted via git checkout after; .jsonl gitignored.

Drawer (40 `@/` importers) + HeaderBarContainer (14) + their `.desktop` variants deliberately NOT moved (Decision D-4): they are standalone app-wide primitives, not in AppLayout's render tree, and moving them would rewrite every consumer to a package path localOverridePlugin can't swap â†’ a desktop regression for all consumers. Keeping them app-side preserves every `@/` desktop swap. Zero churn to their 54 importers.
